title: MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST BEAVERTON MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following services: mental health counseling for individuals, families, and groups, with a focus on trauma, life transitions, grief, PTSD, depression, and anxiety. Support groups and community wellness groups. Mental health evaluations, including assessment, diagnosis, and treatment. Substance use disorder (SUD) treatment: screening, assessment, individual and group counseling, DUII diversion, and conviction support. Peer support and case management to help navigate resources. Psychiatric services, including medication management, for current clients. In-person and telehealth options are available. 3800 SW Cedar Hills Boulevard Suite 288 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Low-income households with a focus on those who have CareOregon (OHP) Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 731-9589 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 731-9589 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service, accepts Medicaid (OHP) and sliding scale is available. Can not bill private insurances. DOCUMENTS: Proof of family size and income if applying for sliding scale LANGUAGES: Arabic, English, Dari, and Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients DUI Offender Programs * Medicaid Recipients Ex-Offender Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Family Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Group Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Individual Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Evaluation * Medicaid Recipients Peer Mental Health Support Services * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST BEAVERTON
